summary_en: 2,800,000 ordinary shares (4.85% of issued stock) to be cancelled effective 2026-06-11. Post-cancellation issued share count: 54,906,700 shares. Rationale: optimize treasury-stock holdings and mitigate future dilution risk.
title_en: Notification Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: Vertex Corporation's board of directors resolved on 2026-05-28 to cancel 2,800,000 treasury shares (4.85% of issued stock) pursuant to the Companies Act Article 178. The cancellation is scheduled for 2026-06-11. The shares being cancelled represent a portion of Vertex's treasury holdings as of the board resolution date. Following cancellation, the company's issued share count (including treasury shares) will be 54,906,700 shares. The stated rationale is to optimize treasury-share holdings and reduce future dilution risk.
